title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-15 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Stories (continued 7–12 of 44)

Story Gap score (%) PM lens QA lens XO lens Verdict Suggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-91980
PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand when clicking Add to compose an email

24% — limited tension in this heuristic pass; lenses largely agree
  • Jira — Make sure what happens on the server matches what recruiters see in the app for this story (errors, limits, and send behaviour).
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) If the ticket mentions system hooks, plan a short engineering check-in—search hits rarely prove end-to-end wiring.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA how to stage send paths with slow networks and mid-flight cancels.
  • Jira — Add one negative path tied to this summary.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, search Salomon on this key’s words—not a generic inbox checklist.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-91980, relate Profile SSP / sliding-panel layout metadata to expand/grow behaviour described in the summary. Risk — Risk from absence: generic Notification classes do not prove inbound reply event routing or conversational-email-specific notif types; SUV + REST contract still required per story.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Add expands the panel with a modal overlay” on HRREC-91980; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Add expands the panel with a modal overlay
